ayahs.arabic: إِنَّآ أَرْسَلْنَا نُوحًا إِلَىٰ قَوْمِهِۦٓ أَنْ أَنذِرْ قَوْمَكَ مِن قَبْلِ أَن يَأْتِيَهُمْ عَذَابٌ أَلِيمٌ
ayahs.simpleArabic: إِنَّا أَرْسَلْنَا نُوحًا إِلَىٰ قَوْمِهِ أَنْ أَنذِرْ قَوْمَكَ مِن قَبْلِ أَن يَأْتِيَهُمْ عَذَابٌ أَلِيمٌ
ayahs.transliteration: Inna arsalna noohan ilaqawmihi an anthir qawmaka min qabli an ya/tiyahum AAathabunaleem
ayahs.translation: Indeed, We sent Noah to his people, [saying], "Warn your people before there comes to them a painful punishment."

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ يَـٰقَوْمِ إِنِّى لَكُمْ نَذِيرٌ مُّبِينٌ
ayahs.simpleArabic: قَالَ يَا قَوْمِ إِنِّي لَكُمْ نَذِيرٌ مُّبِينٌ
ayahs.transliteration: Qala ya qawmi innee lakum natheerunmubeen
ayahs.translation: He said, "O my people, indeed I am to you a clear warner -

ayahs.arabic: أَنِ ٱعْبُدُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ وَٱتَّقُوهُ وَأَطِيعُونِ
ayahs.simpleArabic: أَنِ اعْبُدُوا اللَّهَ وَاتَّقُوهُ وَأَطِيعُونِ
ayahs.transliteration: Ani oAAbudoo Allaha wattaqoohuwaateeAAoon
ayahs.translation: To worship Allāh, fear Him and obey me.

ayahs.arabic: يَغْفِرْ لَكُم مِّن ذُنُوبِكُمْ وَيُؤَخِّرْكُمْ إِلَىٰٓ أَجَلٍ مُّسَمًّى ۚ إِنَّ أَجَلَ ٱللَّهِ إِذَا جَآءَ لَا يُؤَخَّرُ ۖ لَوْ كُنتُمْ تَعْلَمُونَ
ayahs.simpleArabic: يَغْفِرْ لَكُم مِّن ذُنُوبِكُمْ وَيُؤَخِّرْكُمْ إِلَىٰ أَجَلٍ مُّسَمًّى ۚ إِنَّ أَجَلَ اللَّهِ إِذَا جَاءَ لَا يُؤَخَّرُ ۖ لَوْ كُنتُمْ تَعْلَمُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Yaghfir lakum min thunoobikumwayu-akhkhirkum ila ajalin musamman inna ajala Allahiitha jaa la yu-akhkharu law kuntumtaAAlamoon
ayahs.translation: He [i.e., Allāh] will forgive you of your sins and delay you for a specified term. Indeed, the time [set by] Allāh, when it comes, will not be delayed, if you only knew."

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ رَبِّ إِنِّى دَعَوْتُ قَوْمِى لَيْلًا وَنَهَارًا
ayahs.simpleArabic: قَالَ رَبِّ إِنِّي دَعَوْتُ قَوْمِي لَيْلًا وَنَهَارًا
ayahs.transliteration: Qala rabbi innee daAAawtu qawmeelaylan wanahara
ayahs.translation: He said, "My Lord, indeed I invited my people [to truth] night and day.

ayahs.arabic: فَلَمْ يَزِدْهُمْ دُعَآءِىٓ إِلَّا فِرَارًا
ayahs.simpleArabic: فَلَمْ يَزِدْهُمْ دُعَائِي إِلَّا فِرَارًا
ayahs.transliteration: Falam yazidhum duAAa-ee illafirara
ayahs.translation: But my invitation increased them not except in flight [i.e., aversion].

ayahs.arabic: وَإِنِّى كُلَّمَا دَعَوْتُهُمْ لِتَغْفِرَ لَهُمْ جَعَلُوٓا۟ أَصَـٰبِعَهُمْ فِىٓ ءَاذَانِهِمْ وَٱسْتَغْشَوْا۟ ثِيَابَهُمْ وَأَصَرُّوا۟ وَٱسْتَكْبَرُوا۟ ٱسْتِكْبَارًا
ayahs.simpleArabic: وَإِنِّي كُلَّمَا دَعَوْتُهُمْ لِتَغْفِرَ لَهُمْ جَعَلُوا أَصَابِعَهُمْ فِي آذَانِهِمْ وَاسْتَغْشَوْا ثِيَابَهُمْ وَأَصَرُّوا وَاسْتَكْبَرُوا اسْتِكْبَارًا
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-innee kullama daAAawtuhumlitaghfira lahum jaAAaloo asabiAAahum fee athanihimwastaghshaw thiyabahum waasarroo wastakbarooistikbara
ayahs.translation: And indeed, every time I invited them that You may forgive them, they put their fingers in their ears, covered themselves with their garments,[1761] persisted, and were arrogant with [great] arrogance.

ayahs.arabic: ثُمَّ إِنِّى دَعَوْتُهُمْ جِهَارًا
ayahs.simpleArabic: ثُمَّ إِنِّي دَعَوْتُهُمْ جِهَارًا
ayahs.transliteration: Thumma innee daAAawtuhum jihara
ayahs.translation: Then I invited them publicly.

ayahs.arabic: ثُمَّ إِنِّىٓ أَعْلَنتُ لَهُمْ وَأَسْرَرْتُ لَهُمْ إِسْرَارًا
ayahs.simpleArabic: ثُمَّ إِنِّي أَعْلَنتُ لَهُمْ وَأَسْرَرْتُ لَهُمْ إِسْرَارًا
ayahs.transliteration: Thumma innee aAAlantu lahum waasrartu lahumisrara
ayahs.translation: Then I announced to them and [also] confided to them secretly

ayahs.arabic: فَقُلْتُ ٱسْتَغْفِرُوا۟ رَبَّكُمْ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ غَفَّارًا
ayahs.simpleArabic: فَقُلْتُ اسْتَغْفِرُوا رَبَّكُمْ إِنَّهُ كَانَ غَفَّارًا
ayahs.transliteration: Faqultu istaghfiroo rabbakum innahu kanaghaffara
ayahs.translation: And said, 'Ask forgiveness of your Lord. Indeed, He is ever a Perpetual Forgiver.

ayahs.arabic: يُرْسِلِ ٱلسَّمَآءَ عَلَيْكُم مِّدْرَارًا
ayahs.simpleArabic: يُرْسِلِ السَّمَاءَ عَلَيْكُم مِّدْرَارًا
ayahs.transliteration: Yursili assamaa AAalaykummidrara
ayahs.translation: He will send [rain from] the sky upon you in [continuing] showers

ayahs.arabic: وَيُمْدِدْكُم بِأَمْوَٰلٍ وَبَنِينَ وَيَجْعَل لَّكُمْ جَنَّـٰتٍ وَيَجْعَل لَّكُمْ أَنْهَـٰرًا
ayahs.simpleArabic: وَيُمْدِدْكُم بِأَمْوَالٍ وَبَنِينَ وَيَجْعَل لَّكُمْ جَنَّاتٍ وَيَجْعَل لَّكُمْ أَنْهَارًا
ayahs.transliteration: Wayumdidkum bi-amwalin wabaneenawayajAAal lakum jannatin wayajAAal lakum anhara
ayahs.translation: And give you increase in wealth and children and provide for you gardens and provide for you rivers.

ayahs.arabic: مَّا لَكُمْ لَا تَرْجُونَ لِلَّهِ وَقَارًا
ayahs.simpleArabic: مَّا لَكُمْ لَا تَرْجُونَ لِلَّهِ وَقَارًا
ayahs.transliteration: Ma lakum la tarjoona lillahiwaqara
ayahs.translation: What is [the matter] with you that you do not attribute to Allāh [due] grandeur

ayahs.arabic: وَقَدْ خَلَقَكُمْ أَطْوَارًا
ayahs.simpleArabic: وَقَدْ خَلَقَكُمْ أَطْوَارًا
ayahs.transliteration: Waqad khalaqakum atwara
ayahs.translation: While He has created you in stages?[1762]

ayahs.arabic: أَلَمْ تَرَوْا۟ كَيْفَ خَلَقَ ٱللَّهُ سَبْعَ سَمَـٰوَٰتٍ طِبَاقًا
ayahs.simpleArabic: أَلَمْ تَرَوْا كَيْفَ خَلَقَ اللَّهُ سَبْعَ سَمَاوَاتٍ طِبَاقًا
ayahs.transliteration: Alam taraw kayfa khalaqa AllahusabAAa samawatin tibaqa
ayahs.translation: Do you not consider how Allāh has created seven heavens in layers[1763]

ayahs.arabic: وَجَعَلَ ٱلْقَمَرَ فِيهِنَّ نُورًا وَجَعَلَ ٱلشَّمْسَ سِرَاجًا
ayahs.simpleArabic: وَجَعَلَ الْقَمَرَ فِيهِنَّ نُورًا وَجَعَلَ الشَّمْسَ سِرَاجًا
ayahs.transliteration: WajaAAala alqamara feehinna nooran wajaAAalaashshamsa siraja
ayahs.translation: And made the moon therein a [reflected] light and made the sun a burning lamp?

ayahs.arabic: وَٱللَّهُ أَنۢبَتَكُم مِّنَ ٱلْأَرْضِ نَبَاتًا
ayahs.simpleArabic: وَاللَّهُ أَنبَتَكُم مِّنَ الْأَرْضِ نَبَاتًا
ayahs.transliteration: Wallahu anbatakum mina al-ardinabata
ayahs.translation: And Allāh has caused you to grow from the earth a [progressive] growth.

ayahs.arabic: ثُمَّ يُعِيدُكُمْ فِيهَا وَيُخْرِجُكُمْ إِخْرَاجًا
ayahs.simpleArabic: ثُمَّ يُعِيدُكُمْ فِيهَا وَيُخْرِجُكُمْ إِخْرَاجًا
ayahs.transliteration: Thumma yuAAeedukum feehawayukhrijukum ikhraja
ayahs.translation: Then He will return you into it and extract you [another] extraction.

ayahs.arabic: وَٱللَّهُ جَعَلَ لَكُمُ ٱلْأَرْضَ بِسَاطًا
ayahs.simpleArabic: وَاللَّهُ جَعَلَ لَكُمُ الْأَرْضَ بِسَاطًا
ayahs.transliteration: Wallahu jaAAala lakumu al-ardabisata
ayahs.translation: And Allāh has made for you the earth an expanse

ayahs.arabic: لِّتَسْلُكُوا۟ مِنْهَا سُبُلًا فِجَاجًا
ayahs.simpleArabic: لِّتَسْلُكُوا مِنْهَا سُبُلًا فِجَاجًا
ayahs.transliteration: Litaslukoo minha subulan fijaja
ayahs.translation: That you may follow therein roads of passage.'"

ayahs.arabic: قَالَ نُوحٌ رَّبِّ إِنَّهُمْ عَصَوْنِى وَٱتَّبَعُوا۟ مَن لَّمْ يَزِدْهُ مَالُهُۥ وَوَلَدُهُۥٓ إِلَّا خَسَارًا
ayahs.simpleArabic: قَالَ نُوحٌ رَّبِّ إِنَّهُمْ عَصَوْنِي وَاتَّبَعُوا مَن لَّمْ يَزِدْهُ مَالُهُ وَوَلَدُهُ إِلَّا خَسَارًا
ayahs.transliteration: Qala noohun rabbi innahum AAasawneewattabaAAoo man lam yazidhu maluhu wawaladuhu illakhasara
ayahs.translation: Noah said, "My Lord, indeed they have disobeyed me and followed him whose wealth and children will not increase him except in loss.

ayahs.arabic: وَمَكَرُوا۟ مَكْرًا كُبَّارًا
ayahs.simpleArabic: وَمَكَرُوا مَكْرًا كُبَّارًا
ayahs.transliteration: Wamakaroo makran kubbara
ayahs.translation: And they conspired an immense conspiracy

ayahs.arabic: وَقَالُوا۟ لَا تَذَرُنَّ ءَالِهَتَكُمْ وَلَا تَذَرُنَّ وَدًّا وَلَا سُوَاعًا وَلَا يَغُوثَ وَيَعُوقَ وَنَسْرًا
ayahs.simpleArabic: وَقَالُوا لَا تَذَرُنَّ آلِهَتَكُمْ وَلَا تَذَرُنَّ وَدًّا وَلَا سُوَاعًا وَلَا يَغُوثَ وَيَعُوقَ وَنَسْرًا
ayahs.transliteration: Waqaloo la tatharunna alihatakumwala tatharunna waddan wala suwaAAanwala yaghootha wayaAAooqa wanasra
ayahs.translation: And said, 'Never leave your gods and never leave Wadd or Suwāʿ or Yaghūth and Yaʿūq and Nasr.'[1764]

ayahs.arabic: وَقَدْ أَضَلُّوا۟ كَثِيرًا ۖ وَلَا تَزِدِ ٱلظَّـٰلِمِينَ إِلَّا ضَلَـٰلًا
ayahs.simpleArabic: وَقَدْ أَضَلُّوا كَثِيرًا ۖ وَلَا تَزِدِ الظَّالِمِينَ إِلَّا ضَلَالًا
ayahs.transliteration: Waqad adalloo katheeran walatazidi aththalimeena illa dalala
ayahs.translation: And already they have misled many. And, [my Lord], do not increase the wrongdoers except in error."

ayahs.arabic: مِّمَّا خَطِيٓـَٔـٰتِهِمْ أُغْرِقُوا۟ فَأُدْخِلُوا۟ نَارًا فَلَمْ يَجِدُوا۟ لَهُم مِّن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ أَنصَارًا
ayahs.simpleArabic: مِّمَّا خَطِيئَاتِهِمْ أُغْرِقُوا فَأُدْخِلُوا نَارًا فَلَمْ يَجِدُوا لَهُم مِّن دُونِ اللَّهِ أَنصَارًا
ayahs.transliteration: Mimma khatee-atihimoghriqoo faodkhiloo naran falam yajidoo lahum min dooniAllahi ansara
ayahs.translation: Because of their sins they were drowned and put into the Fire, and they found not for themselves besides Allāh [any] helpers.

ayahs.arabic: وَقَالَ نُوحٌ رَّبِّ لَا تَذَرْ عَلَى ٱلْأَرْضِ مِنَ ٱلْكَـٰفِرِينَ دَيَّارًا
ayahs.simpleArabic: وَقَالَ نُوحٌ رَّبِّ لَا تَذَرْ عَلَى الْأَرْضِ مِنَ الْكَافِرِينَ دَيَّارًا
ayahs.transliteration: Waqala noohun rabbi latathar AAala al-ardi mina alkafireenadayyara
ayahs.translation: And Noah said, "My Lord, do not leave upon the earth from among the disbelievers an inhabitant.

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّكَ إِن تَذَرْهُمْ يُضِلُّوا۟ عِبَادَكَ وَلَا يَلِدُوٓا۟ إِلَّا فَاجِرًا كَفَّارًا
ayahs.simpleArabic: إِنَّكَ إِن تَذَرْهُمْ يُضِلُّوا عِبَادَكَ وَلَا يَلِدُوا إِلَّا فَاجِرًا كَفَّارًا
ayahs.transliteration: Innaka in tatharhum yudillooAAibadaka wala yalidoo illa fajirankaffara
ayahs.translation: Indeed, if You leave them, they will mislead Your servants and not beget except [every] wicked one and [confirmed] disbeliever.

ayahs.arabic: رَّبِّ ٱغْفِرْ لِى وَلِوَٰلِدَىَّ وَلِمَن دَخَلَ بَيْتِىَ مُؤْمِنًا وَلِلْمُؤْمِنِينَ وَٱلْمُؤْمِنَـٰتِ وَلَا تَزِدِ ٱلظَّـٰلِمِينَ إِلَّا تَبَارًۢا
ayahs.simpleArabic: رَّبِّ اغْفِرْ لِي وَلِوَالِدَيَّ وَلِمَن دَخَلَ بَيْتِيَ مُؤْمِنًا وَلِلْمُؤْمِنِينَ وَالْمُؤْمِنَاتِ وَلَا تَزِدِ الظَّالِمِينَ إِلَّا تَبَارًا
ayahs.transliteration: Rabbi ighfir lee waliwalidayyawaliman dakhala baytiya mu/minan walilmu/mineena walmu/minatiwala tazidi aththalimeena illatabaran
ayahs.translation: My Lord, forgive me and my parents and whoever enters my house a believer and the believing men and believing women. And do not increase the wrongdoers except in destruction."
